# Also owned by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Pegasus 4.4.4 personality source SHA256:
# 1F89C8D6C9444F575526A8635DB59DF78140AD43401538214E6B62F685298BAA
# Identity classification only: no weights, resources, state, or orders.
# H08a parity: hard, strong, then supporting marker counts; precedence breaks ties.
# H08e exposes at most one lead secondary and never replaces the primary.

staid_archetype_eligible_country = {
	is_country_type = default
	is_nomadic = no
}

staid_identity_megacorp = {
	is_country_type = default
	is_megacorp = yes
}

staid_role_subject = {
	is_country_type = default
	is_subject = yes
}

staid_role_overlord = {
	is_country_type = default
	is_overlord = yes
}

staid_identity_rogue_servitor = {
	is_country_type = default
	has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor
}

staid_identity_assimilator = {
	is_country_type = default
	has_valid_civic = civic_machine_assimilator
}

staid_identity_machine_exterminator = {
	is_country_type = default
	has_valid_civic = civic_machine_terminator
}

staid_identity_devouring_swarm = {
	is_country_type = default
	has_valid_civic = civic_hive_devouring_swarm
}

staid_identity_inward_perfection = {
	is_country_type = default
	has_valid_civic = civic_inwards_perfection
}

staid_identity_barbaric_despoiler = {
	is_country_type = default
	has_valid_civic = civic_barbaric_despoilers
}

staid_identity_nomadic = {
	is_country_type = default
	is_nomadic = yes
}

staid_identity_ordinary_hive = {
	is_country_type = default
	is_nomadic = no
	is_wilderness_empire = no
	is_hive_empire = yes
	NOT = { has_valid_civic = civic_hive_devouring_swarm }
}

staid_archetype_hard_extermination = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = fanatic_purifiers
		has_ai_personality = devouring_swarm
		has_ai_personality = metalhead
		has_ai_personality = exterminators
		has_ai_personality = became_the_crisis
		has_ai_personality = scorching_infernals
		has_ai_personality = hyperthermia_empire
		has_valid_civic = civic_fanatic_purifiers
		has_valid_civic = civic_hive_devouring_swarm
		has_valid_civic = civic_machine_terminator
		has_valid_civic = civic_scorched_earth
		has_valid_civic = civic_hive_scorched_earth
		has_ascension_perk = ap_become_the_crisis
		has_government = gov_devouring_swarm
		has_government = gov_purity_assembly
		has_government = gov_purity_order
		has_government = gov_machine_terminator
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = hive_mind
		has_ai_personality = machine_intelligence
		has_ai_personality = assimilators
		has_ai_personality = servitors
		has_ai_personality = hive_mind_friend
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_defensive = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = decadent_hierarchy
		has_ai_personality = harmonious_hierarchy
		has_ai_personality = xenophobic_isolationists
		has_ethic = ethic_fanatic_pacifist
		has_valid_civic = civic_inwards_perfection
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_research = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = erudite_explorers
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = spiritual_seekers
		has_ai_personality = federation_builders
		has_ai_personality = peaceful_traders
		has_ai_personality = migrating_flock
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_conquest = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = honorbound_warriors
		has_ai_personality = evangelising_zealots
		has_ai_personality = ruthless_capitalists
		has_ai_personality = hegemonic_imperialists
		has_ai_personality = slaving_despots
		has_ai_personality = democratic_crusaders
		has_ai_personality = fanatic_befrienders
	}
}

staid_archetype_identity_conflict = {
	calc_true_if = {
		amount >= 2
		staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_defensive = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_any_hard = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_defensive = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
		staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = {
	calc_true_if = {
		amount >= 1
		has_ai_personality_behaviour = purger
		has_ai_personality_behaviour = attack_neutrals
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_2 = {
	calc_true_if = {
		amount >= 2
		has_ai_personality_behaviour = purger
		has_ai_personality_behaviour = attack_neutrals
	}
}

staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = {
	calc_true_if = {
		amount >= 1
		has_ethic = ethic_gestalt_consciousness
		has_authority = auth_hive_mind
		has_authority = auth_machine_intelligence
		is_wilderness_empire = yes
	}
}

	calc_true_if = {
		amount >= 1
		has_ethic = ethic_pacifist
	}
}

	calc_true_if = {
		amount >= 1
		has_valid_civic = civic_environmentalist
		has_ai_personality_behaviour = isolationist
	}
}

	calc_true_if = {
		amount >= 2

		has_ai_personality_behaviour = isolationist
	}
}

staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = {
	always = yes
}

staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_defensive_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_3 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_3 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_4 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_4 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_5 = no
}

	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	OR = {

staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = {
	always = yes
}

staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_2 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_4 = no
}

staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_2 = no
}

staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_2 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_4 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_5 = no
}

	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_2 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_4 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_5 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_6 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_7 = no
}

staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = {
	always = yes
}

staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_4 = no
}

staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_defensive_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_1 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_4 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_5 = no
}

staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_4 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_5 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_6 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_7 = no
}

staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = {
	always = yes
}

staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_3 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_3 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_4 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_4 = yes
	}
}

	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_defensive_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
	}
}

	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_2 = yes
	}

	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_3 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_3 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_4 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_4 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_5 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_5 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_6 = no
	staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_7 = no
}

	always = yes
}

	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	OR = {

	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_4 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_4 = yes

	OR = {
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_5 = no
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_5 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = {
	always = yes
}

staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_defensive = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_research = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_4 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_5 = no
}

staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_conquest = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {

	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_3 = no

	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_5 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_6 = no

	staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_2 = no

	staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = no

	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_5 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_6 = no

staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_extermination = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = {
	always = yes
}

staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_research = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_2 = yes

	staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_4 = no

		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {

	}
	OR = {

		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_4 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_5 = no
}

staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_conquest = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_3 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_4 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_5 = no
	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_6 = no
}

staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_extermination = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = {
	always = yes
}

staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_defensive = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_research = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_conquest = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_3 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_3 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_4 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_4 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_5 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_5 = yes
	}
	staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_6 = no
}

staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_extermination = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = {
	always = yes
}

staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_defensive = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_research = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_2 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_2 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_2 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_3 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_3 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_4 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_4 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_5 = no
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_5 = yes
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_extermination = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_any_hard = no
			OR = {
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = yes
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_extermination = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_extermination = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_gestalt_growth = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = yes
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_any_hard = no
			OR = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = yes
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_defensive = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_defensive = yes
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_any_hard = no
			OR = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_defensive = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_defensive = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_defensive = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_defensive = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_defensive = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_research = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_any_hard = no
			OR = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_1 = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_1 = yes
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_research = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_research = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_research = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_research = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_research = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_research = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_any_hard = no
			OR = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_diplomatic = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_conquest = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_any_hard = no
			OR = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_1 = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_1 = yes
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_conquest = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_conquest = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_research = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_conquest = no
				}
			}
			OR = {
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = no
				}
				AND = {
					staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
					staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_conquest = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_extermination = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_candidate_extermination = yes
}

staid_archetype_gestalt_growth = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_candidate_gestalt_growth = yes
}

staid_archetype_defensive = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_candidate_defensive = yes
}

staid_archetype_research = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_candidate_research = yes
}

staid_archetype_diplomatic = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_candidate_diplomatic = yes
}

staid_archetype_conquest = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_candidate_conquest = yes
}

staid_archetype_lead_secondary_extermination = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_extermination = no
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
		staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_gestalt_growth = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_defensive = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_research = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_extermination = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_diplomatic = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_conquest = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_extermination = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_lead_secondary_gestalt_growth = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_gestalt_growth = no
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = yes
		staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_extermination = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_defensive = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_research = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_diplomatic = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_conquest = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_lead_secondary_defensive = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_defensive = no
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_defensive = yes
		staid_archetype_strong_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
		staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_extermination = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_defensive = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_gestalt_growth = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_defensive = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_research = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_defensive = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_defensive = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_diplomatic = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_defensive = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_conquest = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_defensive = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_lead_secondary_research = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_research = no
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
		staid_archetype_strong_research_at_least_1 = yes
		staid_archetype_supporting_research_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_extermination = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_research = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_gestalt_growth = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_research = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_defensive = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_research = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_diplomatic = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_research = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_conquest = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_research = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_research = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_lead_secondary_diplomatic = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_diplomatic = no
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
		staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
		staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_extermination = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_gestalt_growth = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_defensive = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_research = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_conquest = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_diplomatic = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_lead_secondary_conquest = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_conquest = no
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
		staid_archetype_strong_conquest_at_least_1 = yes
		staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_at_least_1 = yes
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_extermination = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_extermination_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_extermination = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_extermination_ge_conquest = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_gestalt_growth = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_gestalt_growth_ge_conquest = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_defensive = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_defensive_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_defensive_ge_conquest = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_research = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_research_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_research = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_research_ge_conquest = no
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_diplomatic = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = no
			}
			AND = {
				staid_archetype_strong_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_strong_diplomatic_ge_conquest = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_conquest_ge_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_supporting_diplomatic_ge_conquest = no
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_balanced = {
	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	NOR = {
		staid_archetype_extermination = yes
		staid_archetype_gestalt_growth = yes
		staid_archetype_defensive = yes
		staid_archetype_research = yes
		staid_archetype_diplomatic = yes
		staid_archetype_conquest = yes
	}
}
